scripts.compile:token: cd deps/aztec-standards && PATH="$HOME/.aztec/current/bin:$PATH" aztec compile --package token_contract
scripts.codegen:contracts: PATH="$HOME/.aztec/current/bin:$PATH" aztec codegen nr/target --outdir src/artifacts/escrow -f && mv src/artifacts/escrow/AttestorKeyOracle.ts src/artifacts/oracle/AttestorKeyOracle.ts
scripts.codegen:token: PATH="$HOME/.aztec/current/bin:$PATH" aztec codegen deps/aztec-standards/target --outdir src/artifacts/token -f && rm -f src/artifacts/token/Dripper.ts src/artifacts/token/Escrow.ts src/artifacts/token/GenericProxy.ts src/artifacts/token/NFT.ts src/artifacts/token/TestLogic.ts src/artifacts/token/Vault.ts
scripts.build: pnpm compile && pnpm codegen && pnpm post-codegen
